titles.title: SHARKED Act of 2025
SHARKED Act of 2025
Supporting the Health of Aquatic systems through Research Knowledge and Enhanced Dialogue Act of 2025
SHARKED Act of 2025
Supporting the Health of Aquatic systems through Research Knowledge and Enhanced Dialogue Act of 2025
A bill to direct the Secretary of Commerce to establish a task force regarding shark depredation, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation. Ordered to be reported without amendment favorably.
Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation. Reported by Senator Cruz without amendment. With written report No. 119-114.

calendar.text: Placed on Senate Legislative Calendar under General Orders. Calendar No. 349.

committee.name: Senate Commerce, Science, and Transportation
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
